subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Ayat-i-az Suriy-i-Kahf (Commentary on a Verse from the Surih of the Cave)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath sent down verses from the Kingdom of grandeur and power, and made them a proof for the people [3.5s]... ...As to the intended meaning of Dhu’l-Qarnayn in this verse, it is none other than Muḥammad Himself—may the spirits of them that are nigh unto God be a sacrifice for Him
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نزل الایات من ملکوت العظمه و الاقتدار و جعلها حجه لاهل
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
